arabic:
وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت‏:‏ قالت هند امرأة أبي سفيان للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ إن أبا سفيان رجل شحيح وليس يعطيني ما يكفيني وولدي إلا ما أخذت منه، وهو لا يعلم‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏خذي ما يكفيك وولدك بالمعروف‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏ ‏.‏

english.narrator: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) said:
english.text: Hind, the wife of Abu Sufyan, said to the Prophet (ﷺ): Abu Sufyan is a niggardly man and does not give me and my children adequate provisions for maintenance unless I take something from his possession without his knowledge. The Prophet (ﷺ) said to her, "Take from his possessions on a reasonable basis that much which may suffice for you and your children.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
